brand_identity.name: Marquee
brand_identity.vibe: Cult classic, royal, authoritative, cinematic, profound. It should feel like a high-end film production or an elite private institution, avoiding the generic 'purple-blue AI tech-bro' aesthetic.

global_design_rules.backgrounds: Never use pure #000000. Use Deep Obsidian (#050505). Overlay sections with a subtle fixed grain/noise texture to create a cinematic 'film' feel.
global_design_rules.surfaces: Use glassmorphism sparingly and exclusively as 'Crystal Glass' (e.g., bg-black/40 with backdrop-blur-2xl and a crisp border-white/10). No muddy grey backgrounds.
global_design_rules.borders: Sharp, deliberate. Use 1px border-white/10. Avoid thick glowing neon borders. We want 'Old Money Tech' vibes.
global_design_rules.border_radius: Keep it sharp or extremely minimal (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Avoid pill shapes unless it's a very specific primary CTA.
global_design_rules.spacing: Extremely generous. Sections should have `py-24` or `py-32`. Elements inside grids must have `gap-12` or `gap-16` to let typography breathe.
global_design_rules.motion_and_depth: MANDATORY: Use `lenis` for smooth momentum scrolling. Use `framer-motion` for scroll-linked parallax (e.g., background elements moving slower than foreground elements). Implement layered 3D depth by absolutely positioning images behind content with `z-[-1]` and applying subtle `y` translations on scroll.

typography.strategy: Old Money Tech. Classic Serif Headings + Sterile Modern Sans Body.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]
scales.body: text-base md:text-lg text-white/60 font-normal leading-relaxed tracking-wide

page_sections.name: Navigation
page_sections.layout: Fixed top, backdrop-blur-md, bg-black/50, border-b border-white/5. Minimalist logo on left, 3 links in center, 'Request Access' button on right.
page_sections.interactions: Links hover white. Button uses inverse fill (white bg, black text) on hover.

page_sections.name: Hero Section
page_sections.layout: 100vh height. True cinematic parallax. A massive `Cormorant Garamond` heading in the center. Behind it, a dark textured image layered with a vignette. As user scrolls down, the heading moves up faster than the background image (parallax effect).
page_sections.content: Overline: THE NEW STANDARD. Heading: 'The Interview, Reimagined.' Subtitle: 'Real-time AI cross-questioning. Built for the elite.'
page_sections.visuals: Use `background_texture_1` as an absolute inset-0 layer with opacity 30% and a heavy black gradient overlay.

page_sections.name: How It Works (Live Demo Mockup)
page_sections.layout: Bento Grid (Control Room style). Left side: Sticky text explaining the process ('Listens in real-time. Cross-questions with intent.'). Right side: A mockup of the interview interface.
page_sections.mockup_details: Dark UI window. Top: 'Interviewer' transcript. Middle: 'Candidate' speaking. Bottom: A sleek code editor block showing DSA solution. Use glassmorphism and strict borders.
page_sections.animations: Fade in on scroll. The code editor can have a blinking cursor effect.

page_sections.name: Three Modes Showcase
page_sections.layout:
Asymmetric Bento 'Tetris' Grid. 3 distinct, massive cards overlapping slightly. 
Card 1 (Campuses): span-2, tall. 
Card 2 (Companies): span-2, wide.
Card 3 (Self-Practice): span-2, square.
page_sections.visuals: Each card should feature a distinct, cinematic portrait from `media_urls` masked inside a sharp rectangle, overlaid with black/50. Typography sits elegantly over the image.
page_sections.interactions: Hovering a card desaturates the overlay (revealing the portrait) and scales the image inside by 1.05.

page_sections.name: Interview Domains (Technical, Govt, Custom)
page_sections.layout: Horizontal marquee or a very spacious list layout. 'Editorial Ribbon' style. Huge typography outlining the domains: DSA / SYSTEM DESIGN / UPSC / NDA / MECHANICAL.
page_sections.visuals: Low contrast, slow scrolling text, breaking the standard blocky layout. A moment of purely typographic art.

page_sections.name: Testimonials / Trusted By
page_sections.layout: Centered, high contrast. A single, powerful quote dominating the screen, not a generic carousel. 'Marquee doesn't just assess code. It assesses thought.'
page_sections.visuals: Logos of companies in a muted, low-opacity flex row below.

page_sections.name: CTA & Footer
page_sections.layout: Massive py-40 section. Text: 'Ready to face Marquee?'. A royal accent button. Footer is minimal, multi-column, standard links.
page_sections.visuals: A glowing light effect from the bottom of the screen.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none). Default: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300. Primary CTA: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200.
components_strategy.cards: Cardless aesthetic preferred. If bounded, use 1px border-white/10, bg-transparent, no shadow. Padding inside must be massive (p-8 or p-12).
components_strategy.badges: Border border-white/10, text-xs, uppercase, px-3 py-1.

implementation_notes.frameworks: React, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, Lenis (for smooth scroll), Lucide React (for icons).
implementation_notes.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) must have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta-button'`).
implementation_notes.avoid: No purple/blue gradients. No floating 3D tech-bro blobs. No Inter or generic Sans for headings. No perfectly symmetrical equal-width grids (except for logos).
